description: OpenClaw Setup web interface showing status panel with backup options and debug console with command dropdown including gateway controls and system commands.
WeChat group chat from Xiaomi MiMo community announcing MiMo-V2-Pro and V2-Omni availability on OpenRouter with free trial, plus OpenClaw integration instructions.
Promotional modal for redeeming 1 year free of n8n Cloud Starter with 4-step signup and upgrade instructions requiring annual billing.
Chinese knowledge base permission dialog for adding editable members, showing contact list with search and organizational structure navigation.
Slack conversation where MiaoDX questions GSD bot's identity; WLB clarifies it's separate from GSD, showing bot/user IDs and explaining identity file system.
Detailed Chinese documentation on ensuring OpenClaw long-running tasks return results, covering memory persistence, heartbeat, callbacks, logging, timeout handling, and UI display.
Duplicate: Chinese knowledge base permission dialog for adding editable members with contact list and search functionality.
Slack notification from GSD app confirming PDF report generation complete for weekly-robotics-350-report.pdf with content summary.
Event poster for 'Lobster Shell-Shedding Plan' tech conference on March 15 at Tsinghua Science Park, featuring OpenClaw, AI agents, and multiple speaker sessions.
Discord chat showing OpenClaw bot errors with session file lock timeouts, user asking about thinking level settings, and agent status messages with model info.
